decisions.comment: PRD is clear. Acceptance criteria are measurable. Scope boundaries are well-defined. Proceed to UX phase.
Please add wireframe for the error state on mobile (< 640px). The current wireframe only shows desktop. Also clarify the animation duration for the loading spinner.
Mobile wireframe added. Loading animation spec clarified (200ms). Approved. Proceed to DEV phase.
Risk assessment reviewed. DEMO_MODE flag isolation is acceptable. Auth router changes look minimal and safe. Confirmed: existing endpoints are untouched. Approved to proceed to QA.
All 10 test cases pass. 100% AC coverage. No bugs found. QA observation about DEMO_MODE=false deployment flag noted — will add to deployment checklist. Proceed to Final Review.
Feature complete. All quality gates passed. Demo scenario verified end-to-end. Ready for release. Deployment note: set DEMO_MODE=false in production env.
